title: Kangaroo Level 1-2 - Mixed Practice Set 1
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official AKSF content.

questions.question_text: Which shape below has exactly four straight sides of equal length?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 100' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='30' cy='50' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='25' y='90'>A</text><polygon points='80,30 110,30 110,70 80,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='90' y='90'>B</text><polygon points='150,30 185,30 180,70 145,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='160' y='90'>C</text><polygon points='215,30 245,30 260,70 200,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='225' y='90'>D</text><polygon points='275,30 295,50 275,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='280' y='90'>E</text></svg>
questions.solution: A square has four equal straight sides.

questions.question_text: Lisa has 3 red apples and 4 green apples in a basket. How many apples are in the basket in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 80' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='20' cy='40' r='10' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='45' cy='40' r='10' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='70' cy='40' r='10' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='110' cy='40' r='10' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='135' cy='40' r='10' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='10' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='185' cy='40' r='10' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>

questions.question_text: Tom has 2 coins worth 5 cents each. How many cents does Tom have altogether?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 100' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='60' cy='50' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='52' y='55'>5c</text><circle cx='140' cy='50' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='132' y='55'>5c</text></svg>
questions.solution: 2 x 5 = 10 cents.

questions.question_text: How many corners does the star shape shown below have?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200' font-family='sans-serif'><polygon points='100,20 120,75 180,75 130,110 150,170 100,135 50,170 70,110 20,75 80,75' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: A five-pointed star has 10 corners (5 outer, 5 inner).

questions.question_text: A clock shows the hour hand pointing straight up and the minute hand pointing straight down. What time is it?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 150 150' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='75' cy='75' r='60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='75' y1='75' x2='75' y2='30' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='75' y1='75' x2='75' y2='130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><text x='70' y='20'>12</text><text x='72' y='148'>6</text></svg>
questions.solution: Hour hand at 12 and minute hand at 6 means 12:30.

questions.question_text: Which of these shapes is NOT a triangle?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 80' font-family='sans-serif'><polygon points='20,70 40,20 60,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='30' y='78'>A</text><polygon points='85,70 105,30 125,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='95' y='78'>B</text><polygon points='150,70 170,25 190,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='160' y='78'>C</text><rect x='215' y='30' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='225' y='78'>D</text><polygon points='275,70 290,25 295,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='278' y='78'>E</text></svg>
questions.solution: Shape D is a square, not a triangle.

questions.question_text: Count the black dots shown. How many are there?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 100' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='20' cy='30' r='7' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='50' cy='30' r='7' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='80' cy='30' r='7' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='110' cy='30' r='7' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='140' cy='30' r='7' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='20' cy='70' r='7' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='50' cy='70' r='7' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='80' cy='70' r='7' fill='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: 5 + 3 = 8 dots.

questions.question_text: Anna is 6 years old. Her brother is 3 years older. How old is her brother?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 100' font-family='sans-serif'><text x='20' y='20' font-size='12' fill='currentColor'>Anna (6)</text><g stroke='currentColor' fill='#f0f0f0'><circle cx='20' cy='50' r='6'/><circle cx='36' cy='50' r='6'/><circle cx='52' cy='50' r='6'/><circle cx='20' cy='70' r='6'/><circle cx='36' cy='70' r='6'/><circle cx='52' cy='70' r='6'/></g><text x='100' y='20' font-size='12' fill='currentColor'>Brother (+3)</text><g stroke='currentColor' fill='#e8e8e8'><circle cx='100' cy='50' r='6'/><circle cx='116' cy='50' r='6'/><circle cx='132' cy='50' r='6'/><circle cx='148' cy='50' r='6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='6'/><circle cx='116' cy='70' r='6'/><circle cx='132' cy='70' r='6'/><circle cx='148' cy='70' r='6'/><circle cx='164' cy='70' r='6'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Two groups of circles: Anna has 6 circles, her brother has 9 circles (3 more than Anna).
questions.solution: 6 + 3 = 9 years old.

questions.question_text: The figure below is made of small squares. How many small squares are shaded gray?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='50' y='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='90' y='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='130' y='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='10' y='50' width='40' height='40' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='50' y='50' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='90' y='50' width='40' height='40' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='130' y='50' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='10' y='90' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='50' y='90' width='40' height='40' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='90' y='90' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='130' y='90' width='40' height='40' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: A checkerboard pattern of 3 rows x 4 cols with alternating colors gives 6 shaded squares.

questions.question_text: Ben buys a pencil for 8 cents and pays with a 10 cent coin. How much change does he receive?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 120' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='50' cy='60' r='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='38' y='65' font-size='14' fill='currentColor'>10c</text><text x='30' y='105' font-size='11' fill='currentColor'>paid</text><text x='100' y='65' font-size='22' fill='currentColor'>-</text><rect x='125' y='40' width='50' height='40' rx='4' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='133' y='65' font-size='12' fill='currentColor'>8c</text><text x='128' y='105' font-size='11' fill='currentColor'>pencil</text><text x='185' y='65' font-size='22' fill='currentColor'>=</text><text x='215' y='65' font-size='16' fill='currentColor'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A 10-cent coin minus an 8-cent pencil equals the change received.
questions.solution: 10 - 8 = 2 cents change.

questions.question_text: Four kids stand in a line. Mia is behind Jake. Sam is in front of Jake. Eva is at the very back. Who is first in line?
questions.solution: Order from front to back: Sam, Jake, Mia, Eva.

questions.question_text: Look at the shape below made of two rectangles joined together. How many right angles does the outline have?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150' font-family='sans-serif'><polygon points='20,20 120,20 120,60 180,60 180,120 20,120' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: The L-shaped outline has 6 right angles (5 of 90 degrees, 1 of 270 degrees). Counting all right angles gives 6.

questions.question_text: Kate has 12 stickers. She gives 3 to each of her 3 friends. How many stickers does Kate have left?
questions.solution: She gives away 3 x 3 = 9. 12 - 9 = 3 left.

questions.question_text: In the picture below, how many small triangles can you count in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 180' font-family='sans-serif'><polygon points='100,20 20,160 180,160' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='60' y1='90' x2='140' y2='90' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='100' y1='20' x2='100' y2='160' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: There are 4 small triangles and 2 medium triangles, giving 6 triangles total in this subdivided triangle.

questions.question_text: A box has 2 red balls, 3 blue balls, and 1 yellow ball. Without looking, what is the fewest number of balls you must take out to be sure you have a blue one?
questions.solution: Worst case: take all 2 red and 1 yellow first (3 balls), then the 4th must be blue.

questions.question_text: Which figure below has exactly one line of symmetry?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 80' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='30' cy='40' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='25' y='78'>A</text><polygon points='80,60 100,20 120,60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='95' y='78'>B</text><rect x='150' y='20' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='165' y='78'>C</text><polygon points='215,30 245,30 250,60 210,60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='225' y='78'>D</text><rect x='275' y='25' width='20' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='280' y='78'>E</text></svg>
questions.solution: An isosceles (not equilateral) triangle has exactly one line of symmetry.

questions.question_text: A square piece of paper is folded in half, then folded in half again. How many layers of paper are stacked now?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 250 100' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='20' width='60' height='60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='80' y='55'>-></text><rect x='100' y='35' width='60' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='170' y='55'>-></text><rect x='190' y='35' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: Each fold doubles layers: 1 -> 2 -> 4 layers.

questions.question_text: Three cats sit on a fence. The gray cat is not next to the white cat. The black cat is in the middle. Which cat is on the right if the gray cat is on the left?
questions.solution: Order is gray, black, white from left to right.

questions.question_text: A bakery sells 5 muffins for 20 cents. How much do 2 muffins cost at the same price per muffin?
questions.solution: One muffin = 20/5 = 4 cents. Two muffins = 8 cents.

questions.question_text: The cross below is made of 5 equal squares. If one square has a side of 2 cm, what is the total length of the outline (perimeter) of the cross?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200' font-family='sans-serif'><polygon points='70,20 130,20 130,70 180,70 180,130 130,130 130,180 70,180 70,130 20,130 20,70 70,70' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: The cross outline has 12 segments each 2 cm long. 12 x 2 = 24 cm.

questions.question_text: Emma has twice as many marbles as Leo. Together they have 15 marbles. How many marbles does Leo have?
questions.solution: Leo has x, Emma has 2x. x + 2x = 15, so x = 5.

questions.question_text: Looking at the pattern of arrows below, which direction should the next arrow point?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 80' font-family='sans-serif'><polygon points='20,40 40,30 40,50' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='80,60 70,40 90,40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='140,40 120,30 120,50' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='200,20 190,40 210,40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='250' y='45'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Arrows pointing right, down, left, up, then repeat.
questions.solution: The pattern rotates: right, down, left, up, then right again.

questions.question_text: Today is Wednesday. What day of the week will it be 10 days from today?
questions.solution: 10 days = 1 week + 3 days. Wednesday + 3 days = Saturday.

questions.question_text: How many small cubes were used to build the stack shown below?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 200' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='60' y='120' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='140' y='120' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='60' y='80' width='40' height='40' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='100' y='80' width='40' height='40' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='60' y='40' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: Bottom row 3 + middle row 2 + top row 1 = 6 cubes.
